# @platform/adapters-redis

Redis adapter: connection management, cache operations, and BullMQ queue broker implementation.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @platform/adapters-redis
Version: 0.1.0
Component: adapters-redis
Type: library
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: operations
Bounded context: cache-queue-redis
Owner: team-adapter
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: active
Role: adapter
Class: active.adapter
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: quarterly
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-adapter
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Manage Redis connection lifecycle (connect, reconnect, graceful shutdown)
- Implement the queue-runtime job enqueue interface using BullMQ
- Provide a typed cache accessor for platform packages (session-runtime)
- Enforce key namespace isolation between cache and queue data

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not define queue topology or job schemas (owned by queue-runtime)
- Does not own session lifecycle or claims propagation (owned by session-runtime)
- Does not implement application-level caching strategies

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Imported by platform packages (session-runtime, worker-runtime) that need Redis access
- Never imported directly by feature or application packages

## Operational notes

- Redis key namespaces: sessions:, queues:, cache: ? do not mix
- Connection pool size must be tuned based on worker concurrency settings
